> **Heads up**: A/SIDE has a deliberately narrow product scope. See
> the design principles in [CONTRIBUTING.md](../../CONTRIBUTING.md).
> If your idea conflicts with closed-network, no-algo, no-ads, no-AI
> training, or chronological feed — it'll be politely declined.
> Forking is encouraged.

## What problem does this solve?

The user-facing problem you're hitting.

## Proposed solution

How you'd like A/SIDE to solve it.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches and why this one wins.

## Additional context

Anything else.
